entry.title: Locations
entry.summary: Bitcoin Hashhouses are located in: Pending real estate Pending plebs Interested in creating a Hashhouse in your area? Contact us to get in touch and list your property here.
entry.content:
Bitcoin Hashhouses are located in:

Country City Owner Status Activities
El Salvador El Zonte
(Bitcoin Beach)		 @JayDeLux Operational
  • Hackathons
Mexico Mexico City
(CDMX)		 @btchashhouse

Pending real estate
Pending plebs
  • Learn Spanish
  • Learn DevOps
  • Excellent food, musuems, culture
Belgium   @JayDeLux Operational
  • Hackathons

Interested in creating a Hashhouse in your area? Contact us to get in touch and list your property here.

entry.title: Bitcoin Hashhouse
entry.summary: Bitcoin Hashhouse is an informal network of bitcoiners who seek to live, work, and play in various locations around the world. Connect with bitcoiners who have housing, coworking spaces, and other real estate. Earn bitcoin by leasing your vacant condo Work along side other bitcoiners…
entry.content:
Bitcoin Hashhouse is an informal network of bitcoiners who seek to live, work, and play in various locations around the world.

  • Connect with bitcoiners who have housing, coworking spaces, and other real estate.
  • Earn bitcoin by leasing your vacant condo
  • Work along side other bitcoiners to bring about hyperbitcoinization
  • Temporarily swap your place for another amongst bitcoiners
